response.original_title: 关于太原开具技术服务费发票-太原本地宝
response.overview: Regarding the issuance of technical service fee invoices in Taiyuan [1.5.7-1.8.4.2-2.5.1.5 Manager/←←←Electrical/Wei Synchronization]  Electronic invoices can first be issued for accommodation fees, catering, transportation, construction, leasing, building materials, labor, office supplies, consulting, materials, printing, printing services, home appliances, project payments, meetings, conference services, office consumables, office equipment, medical devices, sports equipment, safety gear, equipment leasing, car rentals, venue rentals, office space rentals, auto parts, waste removal, on-the-ground promotion, trailers, gifts, shopping cards, transportation, landscaping, construction projects, seedling payments, film distribution payments, advertising production, advertising planning, advertising design, event agency, technical services, etc. Where can invoices be issued!
response.title: 关于太原开具技术服务费发票-太原本地宝
